subcodes.first_line: O faithful and self-sacrificing servant! The more thou strivest in service to the friends, the more abundantly shalt thou drink from the cup of grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم صادق جانفشان هرچه در خدمت یاران بیشتر کوشی کاس عنایت بیشتر نوشی و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @praise and encouragement, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
